option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring.application.name=api-gateway spring.config.import=optional:configserver:http://localhost:8888
# Disable Eureka registration until server is available eureka.client.enabled=false
# Gateway configuration spring.cloud.gateway.routes[0].id=fallback-route spring.cloud.gateway.routes[0].uri=http://localhost:8080 spring.cloud.gateway.routes[0].predicates[0]=Path=/fallback
